title: Annual Maintenance Fee Due
description: Residents are requested to pay the annual maintenance fee of Rs. 6,000 before March 31, 2026. Payment can be made via UPI or bank transfer to the SRWA account.

title: Water Supply Schedule Update
description: Due to maintenance work by the Panchayat, water supply will be available from 6:00 AM to 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM from March 6-8. Please store water accordingly.

title: General Body Meeting Notice
description: The Annual General Body Meeting of SRWA will be held on March 15, 2026, at 10:00 AM in the Community Hall. All residents are requested to attend.

title: New Security Measures Implemented
description: CCTV cameras have been installed at all entry/exit points. Visitor management system is now active. Please ensure all visitors register at the gate.

title: Street Light Maintenance Complete
description: All street lights in Blocks A through E have been serviced and non-functional lights replaced. Please report any issues to the association office.
